description: Provider inbox heartbeat — every 5 min, check for HOT leads and low provider credit balances, ping Ali on Telegram

sources: ServiceRequest table: rows with urgency=EMERGENCY AND status=NEW AND assignedProviderId IS NULL AND createdAt > now-15min
LeadCreditAccount table: providers with pointsBalance < 5 AND hasEverLoggedIn=true
Provider table: providers with verificationStatus=VERIFIED AND lastSeenAt > now-24h
discovery.skip_if: no HOT leads AND no providers below threshold

actions: Insert deduped alerts into .hermes/loop-state/heartbeat.jsonl (last 30 min window)
POST to Telegram bot with one-click claim / buy-credits links

evaluator.default_stance: PASS only if Telegram delivery confirmed
checks: No duplicate pings within last 10 min (read heartbeat.jsonl)
If HOT lead was reported, the lead still exists in DB and is unassigned

persistence.format: JSONL — one alert per line with timestamp, type, dedup_key

human_review_points: Ali decides whether to claim / buy from the Telegram message
Loop never sends money, never posts publicly
If Telegram API is down for 3 consecutive runs, pause the loop

alerts.on_telegram_down: log; do NOT spam on every tick
